title: The Fox & The Grapes
content:
This Fox has a longing for grapes,
    He jumps, but the bunch still escapes.
    So he goes away sour;
    And, 'tis said, to this hour
    Declares that he's no taste for grapes.


    The Grapes Of Disappointment Are Always Sour
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Fox & The Grapes", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
